_shape: wide: one record per date, one column per instrument, keyed by the FULL canonical lazydatacore id (e.g. 'ticker:AAPL', not bare 'AAPL') -- matching lazystats.models.ReturnDataset.rows and lazystats.io.datahub.load_returns's real output.
